name: OpenToonz Export Folder Zipper
shortDescription: Package an OpenToonz Export Scene folder into a shareable ZIP file directly in your browser.
description: A browser-only utility that takes the folder created by OpenToonz Export > Export Scene, preserves its structure, summarizes likely OpenToonz contents, and generates a downloadable ZIP plus SHA-256 receipt. Files stay local and are not uploaded to a server.
manual: Use OpenToonz Export > Export Scene first. Then select the exported folder in this tool, review the summary, create the ZIP, and download the result for sharing or troubleshooting.
author: Open Animation Library / Rodney Baker
